lesson: No faults, a completed clean cycle in the log and an empty barrel mean nobody re-primed after cleaning. Fill it — a free fix, and the comedy writes itself.

tests.error-log: No faults. Cleaning cycle completed 11:04 pm. Machine never restocked after.
tests.temp-probe: Barrel in spec, diligently chilling an impressive volume of nothing.
tests.inspect-beater: Spotless. Freshly cleaned. Completely empty of mix.

flavour: Filled it up. Invoice attached. No further questions.
authenticityNote: The free-fix comedy seed from GDD §2.2: after a night clean nobody primed the barrel, so 'it's broken'. Techs genuinely get called out — and paid — for this.
